summary: Workspace Board Organization feature testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 tabs (All, Personal, Team, Invited) working correctly with accurate counts. Team creation, board-team assignment, and category filtering all verified.
passed_tests: Workspace page shows 4 tabs: All (2), Personal (1), Team (1), Invited (0) ✓
Tab counts accurately reflect board counts ✓
Personal tab shows only Sprint Board (created by user, no team) ✓
Team tab shows Team Sprint Board with Marketing Team badge ✓
Invited tab shows empty state 'No invited boards' ✓
All tab shows both boards (2 total) ✓
New Team button visible for workspace owner ✓
Create Team dialog opens with name/description inputs ✓
Create Team creates team successfully (toast notification shown) ✓
New Board button visible on workspace page ✓
Create Board dialog has team assignment dropdown ✓
Team dropdown shows all teams: No team, Marketing Team, Dev Team ✓
Board cards show stats: list count, card count, attachment count ✓
Backend API: Board category field returned correctly (personal/team/invited) ✓
Backend API: Team boards have team_name field ✓
Backend API: Assign board to team works ✓
Backend API: Remove board from team returns to personal ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Board categorization logic correctly determines: team (if team_id set), personal (if created_by = user and no team), invited (if not created_by user)
Tab filtering uses useMemo for performance with categorizedBoards object
Team name badge displays correctly on team boards using team_name field from API
Create Board dialog conditionally renders team select only when teams.length > 0
Board stats (list_count, card_count, attachment_count) calculated server-side for performance
seed_data_creation: UI Test Team created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workspace board organization fully tested. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_workspace_organization.py. Existing teams in workspace: Marketing Team, Dev Team. Existing boards: Sprint Board (personal), Team Sprint Board (team - Marketing Team). Tab filtering works correctly for All/Personal/Team/Invited categories.

tabs_display.details: All 4 tabs (All, Personal, Team, Invited) visible with accurate counts

personal_tab_filter.details: Shows only boards created by user without team assignment

team_tab_filter.details: Shows only boards with team_id set, includes team_name badge

invited_tab_filter.details: Shows boards where user is invited (not creator), displays empty state correctly

create_team_button.details: New Team button visible for workspace owner, opens dialog

create_team_dialog.details: Has Team Name input, Description textarea, Create Team submit button

create_board_team_dropdown.details: Create Board dialog has 'Assign to Team (optional)' dropdown with all workspace teams

board_team_assignment.details: PATCH /api/boards/{id}/team assigns board to team, changes category to 'team'

board_stats.details: Board cards display list_count, card_count, attachment_count icons
